problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: The key to Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? is Perovskite crystal structure optimization — specifically Perovskite crystal structure — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
